name: Duneshade Outpost
seasonal_change: heat spikes and southern predator pressure can turn the outpost from checkpoint to siege posture within days.
seasonal_effects: heat spikes and southern predator pressure can turn the outpost from checkpoint to siege posture within days.
Public schedules, prices, crowding, and enforcement intensity all change before locals bother explaining why.
Ceremony, supply pressure, and route reliability do not all peak at the same time, forcing local adaptation.
